chart.title: Genuine savings per capita
chart.subtitle: Genuine savings = net investment in fixed produced capital formation and overseas investment + change to natural capital + education expenditure.
chart.note: This data is measured in [international-$](#dod:int_dollar_abbreviation) at 1990 prices to account for inflation and differences in living costs between countries.

Genuine saving (Blum, Ducoing, McLaughli.citationShort: – processed by Our World in Data
